item.title: See Serena Williams' Best Moments as a Mom to Olympia and Adira Ohanian
item.description: Serena Williams and husband Alexis Ohanian welcomed their first child Olympia on Sept. 1, 2017, and their second Adira on Aug. 15, 2023

item.title: Andy Griffith's 3 Spouses: All About His Marriages to Barbara Edwards, Solica Cassuto and Cindi Knight
item.description: The 'Andy Griffith Show' star married three women throughout his lifetime

item.title: Savannah Guthrie Makes an Emotional Return to the “Today” Show, Plus Tyriq Withers, Chappell Roan, Reneé Rapp and More
item.description: From Paris to Los Angeles, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Meet Jake Gyllenhaal's Famous Family: From Peter Sarsgaard to Jamie Lee Curtis
item.description: Jake Gyllenhaal’s family includes a slew of famous actors from his sister Maggie Gyllenhaal to his godmother Jamie Lee Curtis

item.title: Martha Stewart, 84, Broke Out the Foolproof Spring Staple That Compliments Any Outfit — Copy Her Look from $10
item.description: Including a style that shoppers call “smooth as butter”
